title: 3 Pack 20mm Solid Brass Padlocks with 9 Keys, Small Locker Padlocks, Solid Brass Body, Mini Luggage, Tool Box, Jewellery Box and Cupboard (2Pcs-32mm)
features: In each package, you will receive a pack of 3 padlocks. Each padlock comes with three keys (9 keys total) with the padlocks measuring approximately 3cm x 2cm (1.18" x 0.78") in size and is a great accessory for keeping your belongings safe
Protect what matters most with our reliable and durable 20mm padlocks. Engineered for strength, security and peace of mind, these padlocks are a great solution for safeguarding your belongings!

Each pack includes three padlocks and nine keys, offering convenience and flexibility for multiple locking applications. With a compact 20mm size, these padlocks are great for securing doors, gates, toolboxes, cabinets and even luggage during travel!
This padlock with keys has been constructed from solid brass finish meaning the padlock can be used to fasten lockers or suitcases without looking out of place!
Each individual padlock in this pack comes with three keys meaning you always have at least one key spare in case of loss or theft!
